lines.text: [Scene Central Perk, everyone's there.]

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: What you guys don't understand is, for us, kissing is as important as any part of it.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Yeah, right!.......Y'serious?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: Oh, yeah!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Everything you need to know is in that first kiss.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: Absolutely.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Yeah, I think for us, kissing is pretty much like an opening act, y'know? I mean it's like the stand-up comedian you have to sit through before Pink Floyd comes out.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Yeah, and-and it's not that we don't like the comedian, it's that-that... that's not why we bought the ticket.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: The problem is, though, after the concert's over, no matter how great the show was, you girls are always looking for the comedian again, y'know? I mean, we're in the car, we're fighting traffic... basically just trying to stay awake.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Yeah, well, word of advice: Bring back the comedian. Otherwise next time you're gonna find yourself sitting at home, listening to that album alone.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: (pause)....Are we still talking about sex?

lines.text: Opening Credits
[Scene: Museum of Prehistoric History, Ross and a co-worker (Marsha) are setting up an exhibit which includes some mannequins of cave people.]

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: No, it's good, it is good, it's just that- mm- doesn't she seem a little angry?

lines.speaker: Marsha
lines.english: Well, she has issues.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Does she.

lines.speaker: Marsha
lines.english: He's out banging other women over the head with a club, while she sits at home trying to get the mastodon smell out of the carpet!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Marsha, these are cave people. Okay? They have issues like 'Gee, that glacier's getting kinda close.' See?

lines.speaker: Marsha
lines.english: Speaking of issues, isn't that your ex-wife?

lines.text: (Carol, Ross's ex-wife, has entered behind them and is standing outstide the exhibit.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: (trying to ignore her) No. No.

lines.speaker: Marsha
lines.english: Yes, it is. Carol! Hi!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Okay, okay, yes, it is. (waves) How about I'll, uh, catch up with you in the Ice Age.

lines.text: (Marsha extis and Ross waves Carol into the exhibit.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Hi.

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.english: So.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: You look great. I, uh... I hate that.

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.english: Sorry. You look good too.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Ah, well, in here, anyone who... stands erect... So what's new? Still, uh...

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.english: A lesbian?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Well... you never know. How's, um.. how's the family?

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.english: Marty's still totally paranoid. Oh, and, uh-

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Why- why are you here, Carol?

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.english: I'm pregnant.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Pregnant?!

lines.text: [Scene: Monica and Rachel's, Chandler, Joey, Phoebe, and Monica are watching Three's Company.]

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Oh, I think this is the episode of Three's Company where there's some kind of misunderstanding.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: ...Then I've already seen this one! (Turns off the TV.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: (taking a drink from Joey) Are you through with that?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Yeah, sorry, the swallowing slowed me down.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: Whose little ball of paper is this?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Oh, uh, that would be mine. See, I wrote a note to myself, and then I realised I didn't need it, so I balled it up and... (sees that Monica is glaring at him) ...now I wish I was dead.

lines.text: (Monica starts to fluff a pillow.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: She's already fluffed that pillow... Monica, you know, you've already fluffed that- (Monica glares at her.) -but, it's fine!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: Look , I'm sorry, guys, I just don't wanna give them any more ammunition than they already have.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Yes, and we all know how cruel a parent can be about the flatness of a child's pillow.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: Monica- Hi! Um, Monica, you're scaring me. I mean, you're like, you're like all chaotic and twirly. And not-not in a good way.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Yeah, calm down. You don't see Ross getting all chaotic and twirly every time they come.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: That's because as far as my parents are concerned, Ross can do no wrong. Y'see, he's the Prince. Apparently they had some big ceremony before I was born.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: (looking out the window) Ew, ew, ew, ew ew ew ew ew!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: What?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Ugly Naked Guy got a Thighmaster!

lines.speaker: All
lines.english: Eeaagh!

lines.text: (Rachel enters from her room.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Has anybody seen my engagement ring?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: Yeah, it's beautiful.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Oh God, oh God, oh God oh God oh God oh God.... (Starts to look under the couch cushions.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: No, look, don't touch that!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Oh, like I wasn't dreading tomorrow enough, having to give it back to him... 'Hi Barry! Remember me? I'm the girl in the veil who stomped on your heart in front of your entire family!' Oh God and now I'm gonna have to return the ring, without the ring, which makes it so much harder...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: Easy Rach, we'll find it. (To all) Won't we!

lines.speaker: Chandler and Joey
lines.english: Oh! Yeah!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Alright, when'd'ya have it on last?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: Doy! Probably right before she lost it!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: You don't get a lot of 'doy' these days...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: I know I had it this morning, and I know I had it when I was in the kitchen with...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: ...Dinah?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: (looks at the lasagne and realizes something) Ohhhhh, don't be mad...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: You didn't.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Oh, I am sorry...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: I gave you one job! (Starts to examin the lasagne through the bottom of the glass pan.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Oh, but look how straight those noodles are!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Now, Monica, you know that's not how you look for an engagement ring in a lasagne...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: (puts down the lasagne) I just... can't do it.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Boys? We're going in.

lines.text: (Chandler, Joey, and Phoebe start to pick through the lasagne as there's a knock on the door which Monica answers.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: (standing outside the door).....Hi.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: Wow. That is not a happy hi.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Carol's pregnant.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: (while everyone else is stunned) Ooh! I found it!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Yeah. Do that for another two hours, you might be where I am right about now. (He enters.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Kinda puts that whole pillow thing in perspective, huh, Mon?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Well now, how-how do you fit into this whole thing?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Well, Carol says she and Susan want me to be involved, but if I'm not comfortable with it, I don't have to be involved.. basically it's entirely up to me.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: She is so great! I miss her.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: What does she mean by 'involved'?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: I mean presumably, the biggest part of your job is done.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Anyway, they want me to go down to this- sonogram thing with them tomorrow.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: So what are you gonna do?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: I have no idea. No matter what I do, though, I'm still gonna be a father.

lines.text: (Joey starts to eat the rest of the lasagne and everyone turns and stares at him.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: .....Well, this is still ruined, right?

lines.text: [Scene, Monica and Rachel's, Monica and Ross are pouring wine for their parents.]

lines.speaker: Mrs. Geller
lines.english: Oh, Martha Ludwin's daughter is gonna call you. (Tastes a snack) Mmm! What's that curry taste?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: Curry.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Geller
lines.english: Mmmm!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: I- I think they're great! I, I really do.

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.english: (To Ross) Do you remember the Ludwins? The big one had a thing for you, didn't she?

lines.speaker: Mrs. Geller
lines.english: They all had a thing for him.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Aw, Mom...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: I'm sorry, why is this girl going to call me?

lines.speaker: Mrs. Geller
lines.english: Oh, she just graduated, and she wants to be something in cooking, or food, or.... I don't know. Anyway, I told her you had a restaurant-

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: No Mom, I don't have a restaurant, I work in a restaurant.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Geller
lines.english: Well, they don't have to know that... (She starts to fluff the same pillow Monica fluffed multiple times earlier.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: Ross, could you come and help me with the spaghetti, please?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Yeah. (They go to the kitchen.)

lines.speaker: Mrs. Geller
lines.english: Oh, we're having spaghetti! That's.... easy.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: I know this is going to sound unbelievably selfish, but, were you planning on bringing up the whole baby/lesbian thing? Because I think it might take some of the heat off me.

lines.text: [Time Lapse, everyone is now eating.]

lines.speaker: Mrs. Geller
lines.english: What that Rachel did to her life.... We ran into her parents at the club, they were not playing very well.

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.english: I'm not gonna tell you what they spent on that wedding... but forty thousand dollars is a lot of money!

lines.speaker: Mrs. Geller
lines.english: Well, at least she had the chance to leave a man at the altar...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: What's that supposed to mean?

lines.speaker: Mrs. Geller
lines.english: Nothing! It's an expression.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: No it's not.

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.english: Don't listen to your mother. You're independent, and you always have been! Even when you were a kid... and you were chubby, and you had no friends, you were just fine! And you would read alone in your room, and your puzzles...

lines.text: [Time Lapse.]

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.english: Look, there are people like Ross who need to shoot for the stars, with his museum, and his papers getting published. Other people are satisfied with staying where they are- I'm telling you, these are the people who never get cancer.

lines.text: [Time Lapse.]

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.english: ...And I read about these women trying to have it all, and I thank God 'Our Little Harmonica' doesn't seem to have that problem.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: (trying desperately to change the subject) So, Ross, what's going on with you? Any stories? (Digs her elbow into his hand.) No news, no little anecdotes to share with the folks?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: (pulls his hand away) Okay! Okay. (To his parents) Look, I, uh- I realise you guys have been wondering what exactly happened between Carol and me, and, so, well, here's the deal. Carol's a lesbian. She's living with a woman named Susan. She's pregnant with my child, and she and Susan are going to raise the baby.

lines.text: (Stunned silence ensues.)

lines.speaker: Mrs. Geller
lines.english: (To Monica) And you knew about this?!

lines.text: Commercial Break
[Scene: Central Park, everyone's there.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Your folks are really that bad, huh?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Well, y'know, these people are pros. They know what they're doing, they take their time, they get the job done.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: Boy, I know they say you can't change your parents,... boy, if you could- (To Ross) -I'd want yours.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Must pee. (Goes to pee.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: Y'know, it's even worse when you're twins.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: You're twins?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: Yeah. We don't speak. She's like this high-powered, driven career type.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: What does she do?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: She's a waitress.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: All right, you guys, I kinda gotta clean up now. (They all start to leave.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: Chandler, you're an only child, right? You don't have any of this.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Well, no, although I did have an imaginary friend, who... my parents actually preferred.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: The lights, please..

lines.text: (Joey turns off the lights, and they all leave as Rachel starts to clean up. Ross enters from the bathroom.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: ...How long was I in there?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: I'm just cleaning up.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: D'ya.. uh.. d'ya need any help?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Uh.. okay, sure! Thanks! (She hands him the broom and sits down.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Anyway.. um.. (Starts to sweep.) So, you- uh- you nervous about Barry tomorrow?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Oh.. a little..

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Mm-hmm..

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: A lot.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Mm.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: So, got any advice? Y'know, as someone who's recently been- dumped?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Well, you may wanna steer clear of the word 'dumped'. Chances are he's gonna be this, this broken shell of a man, y'know, so you should try not to look too terrific, I know it'll be hard. Or, y'know, uh, hey!, I'll go down there, and I'll give Barry back his ring, and you can go with Carol and Susan to the OB/GYN...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Oh, you've got Carol tomorrow.. When did it get so complicated?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Got me.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Remember when we were in high school together?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: I mean, didn't you think you were just gonna meet somone, fall in love- and that'd be it? (Ross gazes at her.) ..Ross?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Yes, yes!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Oh! Man, I never thought I'd be here.. (She leans back onto his hand.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Me either... (He pulls up a stool so that he doesn't have to move his hand.)

lines.text: [Scene: Carol's OB/GYN, Carol is waiting.]

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: (entering) Sorry I'm late, I was stuck at work. There was this big dinosaur.. thing.. anyway.

lines.text: (Susan enters holding a drink.)

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Hi.

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.english: Ross, you remember Susan.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: How could I forget?

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Ross.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: (they shake hands) Hello, Susan. (To Carol) Good shake. Good shake. So, uh, we're just waiting for...?

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.english: Dr. Oberman.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: ..Dr. Oberman. Okay. And is he-

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: She.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: -she, of course, she- uh- familiar with our.. special situation?

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.english: Yes, and she's very supportive.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Okay, that's great. (Susan gives her drink to Carol.) No, I'm- Oh.

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.english: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: (picks up a surgical instrament and mimes a duck with it) Quack, quack..

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.english: Ross? That opens my cervix. (He drops it in horror.)

lines.text: [Scene Barry's office, Barry is working on patient, Robbie, as Rachel enters.]

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Barry?

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.english: C'mon in.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: (hesitates) Are you sure?

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.english: Yeah! It's fine, it's fine. Robbie's gonna be here for hours.

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Huh?!

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.english: So, how ya doin?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: I'm- uh- I'm okay... You look great!

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.english: Yeah, well..

lines.speaker: Bernice
lines.english: (over intercom) Dr. Farber, Jason Greenstein's gagging.

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.english: (answering the intercom) Be right there. (To Robbie and Rachel) Be back in a sec.

lines.text: (As Barry exits Robbie stares at Rachel.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: I dumped him.

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Okay.

lines.text: [Scene: Carol's OB/GYN, they're talking about how this is going to work.]

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: So, um- so how's this, uh, how's this gonna work? Y'know, with us? Y'know, when, like, important decisions have to be made?

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.english: Give me a 'for instance'.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Well, uh, uh, I don't know, okay, okay, how about with the, uh, with the baby's name?

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.english: Marlon-

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Marlon?!

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.english: -if it's a boy, Minnie if it's a girl.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: ...As in Mouse?

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.english: As in my grandmother.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Still, you- you say Minnie, you hear Mouse. Um, how about, um.. how about Julia?

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.english: Julia..

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: We agreed on Minnie.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: 'S'funny, um, uh, we agreed we'd spend the rest of our lives together. Things change, roll with the punches. I believe Julia's on the table..?

lines.text: [Scene: Barry's office, Rachel is doing her makeup in the mirror on Barry's lamp as Barry enters.]

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.english: Sorry about that. So. What have you been up to?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Oh, not much. I-I got a job.

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.english: Oh, that's great.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Why are- why are you so tanned?

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.english: Oh, I, uh- I went to Aruba.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Oh no. You went on our honeymoon alone?

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.english: No. I went with, uh.. Now, this may hurt.

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Me?!

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.english: No! (To Rachel) I went with Mindy.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Mindy?! My maid of honour, Mindy?!

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.english: Yeah, well, uh, we're kind of a thing now.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Oh! Well, um.. (Grabs his forehand) You've got plugs!

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.english: Careful! They haven't quite taken yet.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: And you've got lenses! But you hate sticking your finger in your eye!

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.english: Not for her. Listen, I really wanted to thank you.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Okay..

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.english: See, about a month ago, I wanted to hurt you. More than I've ever wanted to hurt anyone in my life. And I'm an orthodontist.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Wow.

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.english: You know, you were right? I mean, I thought we were happy. We weren't happy. But with Mindy, now I'm happy. Spit.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: What?

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Me. (Spits.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Anyway, um, (Gets the ring out of her purse.) I guess this belongs to you. And thank you for giving it to me.

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.english: Well, thank you for giving it back.

lines.text: (Barry and Rachel look at each other.)

lines.speaker: Robbie
lines.english: Hello?!

lines.text: [Scene: Carol's OB/GYN, they're still arguing about what to name the baby.]

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Oh, please! What's wrong with Helen?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Helen Geller? I don't think so.

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.english: Hello? It's not gonna be Helen Geller.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Thank you!

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.english: No, I mean it's not Geller.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: What, it's gonna be Helen Willick?

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.english: No, actually, um, we talked about Helen Willick-Bunch.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Well, wait a minute, wha- why is she in the title?

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: It's my baby too.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Oh, 's'funny, really? Um, I don't remember you making any sperm.

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Yeah, and we all know what a challenge that is!

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.english: All right, you two, stop it!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: No no no, she gets a credit, hey, I'm in there too.

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.english: Ross. You're not actually suggesting Helen Willick-Bunch-Geller? 'Cause I think that borders on child abuse.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Of course not, I'm... suggesting Geller-Willick-Bunch.

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Oh, no, nonononono, you see what he's doing? He knows no-one's gonna say all those names, so they'll wind up calling her Geller, then he gets his way!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: My way?! You-you think this is my way? Believe me, of all the ways I ever imagined this moment in my life being, this is not my way- y'know what? Uh, um, this is too hard. I'm not, I can't do-

lines.speaker: Dr. Oberman
lines.english: (entering) Knock knock!How are we today? Any nausea?

lines.speaker: All
lines.english: Yeah. Yeah. A little.

lines.speaker: Dr. Oberman
lines.english: Well, I was just wondering about the mother-to-be, but.. thanks for sharing. (To Carol) Uh, lie back..

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: You- uh- y'know what, I'm gonna go. I don't- I don't think I can be involved in this particular thing right now.

lines.text: (He turns to go, but the sound of the sonogram catches hes ear. He returns and stares at it.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Oh my God.

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.english: Look at that.

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.english: I know.

lines.text: Closing Credits
[Scene: Monica and Rachel's apartment, everyone is watching the tape of the sonogram. Rachel is on the phone.]

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Well? Isn't that amazing?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: What are we supposed to be seeing here?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: I dunno, but.. I think it's about to attack the Enterprise.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: You know, if you tilt your head to the left, and relax your eyes, it kinda looks like an old potato.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Then don't do that, alright?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: Okay!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: (walks over to where Monica is standing)Monica. Whaddya think?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: (welling up) Mm-hmm.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Wh- are you welling up?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: No.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: You are, you're welling up.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: Am not!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: You're gonna be an aunt.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: (pushes him and starts to cry) Oh shut up!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: (on phone) Hi, Mindy. Hi, it-it's Rachel. Yeah, I'm fine. I-I saw Barry today. Oh, yeah, yeah he-he told me. No, no, it's okay. I hope you two are very happy, I really do. Oh, oh, and Mind, y'know, if-if everything works out, and you guys end up getting married and having kids- and everything- I just hope they have his old hairline and your old nose. (Slams the phone down.) (To everyone) Okay, I know it was a cheap shot, but I feel so much better now.

lines.text: End
